name: Locksmith
description: Optional tool bridge for Agent Locksmith credential-proxy deployments.

baseUrl.label: Locksmith Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the Agent Locksmith service.

inboundToken.label: Locksmith Inbound Token
inboundToken.help: Optional bearer token required by Locksmith inbound auth.

adminToken.label: Locksmith Admin Token
adminToken.help: Bearer token for Locksmith /admin/* endpoints (used by `openclaw locksmith audit`). Stored as a SecretRef when supplied as an object.

catalogTtlSeconds.label: Catalog Cache TTL
catalogTtlSeconds.help: How long to cache /tools discovery results.

timeoutSeconds.label: Default Timeout
timeoutSeconds.help: Default request timeout in seconds for Locksmith discovery and calls.

maxResponseBytes.label: Max Response Bytes
maxResponseBytes.help: Maximum response payload size to buffer per Locksmith request.

promptCatalog.label: Prompt Catalog Guidance
promptCatalog.help: When enabled, inject the discovered Locksmith tool catalog into system context.

tools.*.enabled.label: Enable projected tool
tools.*.enabled.help: When true, registers a synthetic locksmith_<slug> agent tool bound to this Locksmith slug.

tools.*.label.label: Tool label
tools.*.label.help: Optional display label for the projected tool.

tools.*.description.label: Tool description
tools.*.description.help: Optional operator-supplied description shown to the agent.
